## TRM1.2. Additional time in taxi-in phase (PI#5)

Six German airports are subject to the monitoring of this indicator: Frankfurt, Munich, Berlin, Düsseldorf, Hamburg and Cologne/Bonn. In most cases there was less than 0.1 minutes of difference compared to 2024.

The additional time in 2025 was equal to 2.41 min/arr in Frankfurt, 1.66 min/arr in Munich, 1.34 in Berlin, 0.97 min/arr in Düsseldorf, 1.24 min/arr in Hamburg and 1.66 min/arr in Cologne/Bonn.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 1.79 min/arr.
